# dependencytrack_repositories (Data Source)

Retrieves component repositories from Dependency-Track, optionally filtered by type. API key values (passwords) are never returned.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch all repositories
data "dependencytrack_repositories" "all" {}

# Fetch only Maven repositories
data "dependencytrack_repositories" "maven" {
  type = "MAVEN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `type` (String) Only return repositories of this type. One of: CARGO, COMPOSER, CPAN, GEM, GITHUB, GO_MODULES, HEX, MAVEN, NPM, NUGET, PYPI. When omitted, all repositories are returned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of this data source result: the type filter when set, otherwise `all`.
- `repositories` (Attributes List) List of repositories (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories))

<a id="nestedatt--repositories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories`

Read-Only:

- `authentication_required` (Boolean) Whether authentication is required to access the repository
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the repository is enabled
- `id` (String) The UUID of the repository
- `identifier` (String) The unique identifier of the repository
- `internal` (Boolean) Whether the repository is internal
- `resolution_order` (Number) The resolution order of the repository
- `type` (String) The type of the repository
- `url` (String) The URL of the repository
